title: Machu Picchu Full Day
summary: Panoramic Vistadome train, entrance, bus to the citadel, and certified bilingual guide.
description: Visit the wonder of the world in a single day from Cusco. Early departure to Ollantaytambo to board the Vistadome train with panoramic views, arrival at Aguas Calientes and a bus up to the Inca citadel. 2-hour guided tour with a certified expert, free time for photos, and return to Cusco at the end of the day.
highlights: Entrance to the Machu Picchu citadel
Hotel pick-up and drop-off in Cusco
excludes: Expenses not mentioned in the itinerary

itinerary.title: Hotel pick-up
itinerary.description: Private transport from your hotel to Ollantaytambo station. Breakfast en route.

itinerary.title: Vistadome train to Aguas Calientes
itinerary.description: Panoramic windows, snacks, and drinks during the 1h 45min ride.

itinerary.title: Bus up to the Machu Picchu citadel
itinerary.description: Bus up the Hiram Bingham road. 2-hour guided tour with a certified expert.

itinerary.title: Lunch and free time
itinerary.description: Lunch in Aguas Calientes. Free time for photos or to explore the town.

itinerary.title: Return to Cusco
itinerary.description: Return train and hotel drop-off. Estimated arrival at 21:30.

title: Humantay Lake
summary: Turquoise lake at 4,200 m / 13,780 ft. Breakfast, lunch, and optional horseback ride with a local muleteer.
description: About a two-hour hike from Soraypampa to the stunning turquoise waters of Humantay Lake, at the foot of the snow-capped peak of the same name. Includes Andean breakfast, buffet lunch on the way back, bilingual guide, and the option to ride up with a local muleteer.
highlights: Guided hike up to the lake
Optional horseback ride with a muleteer
Hotel pick-up and drop-off in Cusco

itinerary.title: Hotel pick-up
itinerary.description: Departure from Cusco towards Mollepata in a private van.

itinerary.title: Andean breakfast in Mollepata
itinerary.description: Hot drinks, breads, eggs, and local fruits before the hike.

itinerary.title: Hike from Soraypampa
itinerary.description: Two-hour guided ascent. Optional horseback ride with a local muleteer.

itinerary.title: Humantay Lake viewpoint
itinerary.description: Free time at the turquoise lake for photos and a short rest.

itinerary.title: Buffet lunch
itinerary.description: Restorative lunch back at the base camp.

itinerary.title: Return to Cusco
itinerary.description: Hotel drop-off. Estimated arrival at 18:30.

title: Rainbow Mountain
summary: Hike to Vinicunca (Rainbow Mountain). Includes breakfast, lunch, and an expert local guide.
description: Vinicunca, the Rainbow Mountain, is one of the most striking landscapes in the Peruvian Andes. Early morning departure to Cusipata, breakfast en route, and a 1.5-hour hike to the viewpoint at 5,036 m / 16,521 ft. Free time for photos and return with lunch included.
highlights: Guided hike to the Vinicunca viewpoint

itinerary.title: Hotel pick-up
itinerary.description: Departure from Cusco toward Cusipata in a private van.

itinerary.title: Andean breakfast in Cusipata
itinerary.description: Coca tea, eggs, breads, and fruit before the hike.

itinerary.title: Hike to the Vinicunca viewpoint
itinerary.description: 1.5-hour guided ascent up to 5,036 m / 16,521 ft.

itinerary.title: Photo time and descent
itinerary.description: Free time at the rainbow ridge before descending back.

itinerary.title: Buffet lunch
itinerary.description: Hearty lunch back in Cusipata.

itinerary.title: Return to Cusco
itinerary.description: Hotel drop-off at the end of the day.

title: Sacred Valley VIP
summary: Pisac, Ollantaytambo, Chinchero, and the Maras salt mines. Buffet lunch included.
description: Full-day tour of the Sacred Valley of the Incas with small groups and a bilingual guide. Visit Pisac market and ruins, enjoy a buffet lunch in Urubamba, explore the Inca fortress of Ollantaytambo, the traditional weavers of Chinchero, and the pre-Hispanic salt mines of Maras.

itinerary.title: Hotel pick-up
itinerary.description: Departure from Cusco in a private van toward Pisac.

itinerary.title: Pisac ruins and market
itinerary.description: Guided tour of the Inca terraces, then free time at the artisans' market.

itinerary.title: Buffet lunch in Urubamba
itinerary.description: Local and international buffet at a riverside restaurant.

itinerary.title: Ollantaytambo fortress
itinerary.description: Guided walk through the Inca fortress and old town.

itinerary.title: Chinchero weavers
itinerary.description: Demonstration of traditional Andean weaving techniques.

itinerary.title: Maras salt mines
itinerary.description: Visit the pre-Hispanic terraced salt evaporation ponds.

itinerary.title: Return to Cusco
itinerary.description: Hotel drop-off at the end of the day.

title: Maras & Moray ATV Tour
summary: Ride past the circular terraces of Moray and the Maras salt mines on a quad bike.
description: ATV adventure across the Chinchero plains, the concentric terraces of Moray, and the salt mines of Maras. Safety briefing, full gear, and an experienced guide-instructor. Suitable for riders with basic or advanced experience.

itinerary.title: Hotel pick-up
itinerary.description: Transfer from your hotel in Cusco to the ATV base near Chinchero.

itinerary.title: Safety briefing and gear-up
itinerary.description: Helmet, gloves, and riding lesson before heading out.

itinerary.title: ATV ride to Moray
itinerary.description: Cross the Chinchero plains down to the circular Moray terraces.

itinerary.title: Maras salt mines
itinerary.description: Photo stop at the iconic pre-Hispanic terraced salt ponds.

itinerary.title: Return to base
itinerary.description: Ride back to the ATV base and gear hand-off.

itinerary.title: Drop-off in Cusco
itinerary.description: Hotel drop-off in central Cusco.

title: Best of Peru 10D / 9N
summary: Lima, Paracas, Nazca, Cusco, Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu, Vinicunca, and Humantay.
description: Ten days across Peru's must-see destinations. Tour historic Lima, the Ballestas Islands in Paracas, a flight over the Nazca Lines, the Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu by Vistadome train, Rainbow Mountain, and Humantay Lake. Hand-picked hotels, private transport, and local guides at every destination.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Lima
itinerary.description: Airport pick-up and transfer to your boutique hotel in Miraflores.

itinerary.title: Lima city and food tour
itinerary.description: Historic centre, Larco Museum, and a guided culinary walk in Barranco.

itinerary.title: Paracas and Ballestas Islands
itinerary.description: Drive south, boat ride around the Ballestas, and overnight in Paracas.

itinerary.title: Nazca Lines flight
itinerary.description: Small-plane flight over the Nazca Lines, then back to Lima.

itinerary.title: Fly to Cusco
itinerary.description: Morning flight, easy day to acclimatise. Coca tea welcome.

itinerary.title: Sacred Valley
itinerary.description: Pisac, Ollantaytambo, Chinchero, and Maras. Overnight in the valley.

itinerary.title: Machu Picchu
itinerary.description: Vistadome train, guided citadel tour, return to Cusco.

itinerary.title: Rainbow Mountain
itinerary.description: Full day to Vinicunca with breakfast and lunch included.

itinerary.title: Humantay Lake
itinerary.description: Day hike to the turquoise lake. Free evening in Cusco.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your onward flight.
